predicates.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof of possessing Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is legally considered a foreigner.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

predicates.name: falls_under_community_law_free_movement
predicates.description: The person falls under Community law regarding free movement.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is legally considered a third-country national.

predicates.name: present_on_territory
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory.

predicates.name: meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: The person meets the conditions for entry or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: is_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person's presence on the territory is legally considered an illegal stay.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_determination_or_transfer_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the responsible Member State.

predicates.name: has_risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: There is a legal risk of absconding for the person.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person possesses a valid travel document.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_passport
predicates.description: The person possesses a valid passport.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_identity_document
predicates.description: The person possesses a valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognized_as_national_by_country
predicates.description: The person is recognized as a national by their country's national authority.

predicates.name: country_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person's country is willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person falls under a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is legally considered an identified foreigner.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination has been performed for the person.

predicates.name: entered_illegally
predicates.description: The person entered the territory illegally.

predicates.name: submitted_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
predicates.description: The person submitted a residence application after illegal entry.

predicates.name: submitted_residence_application_during_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person submitted a residence application during an illegal stay.

predicates.name: submitted_international_protection_request_within_legal_timeframe
predicates.description: The person submitted a request for international protection within the legal timeframe.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_or_documents_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information or documents in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: cooperated_with_authorities_regarding_entry_stay_removal
predicates.description: The person cooperated with authorities regarding entry, stay, or removal.

predicates.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person indicated unwillingness to comply with the measure.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person failed to comply with the measure.

predicates.name: is_transfer_return_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The measure is a transfer, return, or removal measure.

predicates.name: is_entry_ban_not_lifted_or_suspended
predicates.description: The measure is an entry ban that is neither lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: is_less_coercive_measure_to_guarantee_transfer_return_removal
predicates.description: The measure is a less coercive measure aimed at guaranteeing transfer, return, or removal.

predicates.name: is_freedom_restricting_measure_for_public_order_or_national_security
predicates.description: The measure is a freedom-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: is_equivalent_measure_by_other_member_state
predicates.description: The measure is an equivalent measure taken by another Member State.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_realm_or_member_state
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the realm or another Member State that is neither lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_refusal_or_termination_of_stay
predicates.description: The person submitted a new application immediately after a refusal or termination of stay.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_return_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person submitted a new application immediately after a return or removal measure.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprinting_in_other_dublin_state_during_interview
predicates.description: The person concealed prior fingerprinting in another Dublin state during an interview.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_decisions_in_realm_or_member_states
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple applications resulting in negative decisions in the realm or Member States.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_request_in_other_dublin_state_during_interview
predicates.description: The person concealed a prior international protection request in another Dublin state during an interview.

predicates.name: declared_or_dossier_shows_arrival_for_other_purposes_than_application
predicates.description: The person declared or their dossier shows arrival for purposes other than their application.

predicates.name: fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal_at_council_for_alien_law_litigation
predicates.description: The person was fined for a manifestly unlawful appeal at the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: meets_at_least_one_absconding_criterion
predicates.description: The person meets at least one of the objective criteria for risk of absconding.
